title: Sheet Iron armor
description: Makes iron armor craftable with iron sheets instead of iron ingots
body:
Makes iron armor craftable with iron sheets from the create mod instead of pure iron ingots. Pairs well with copper equipment, and if you want to make progression take longer for increased difficulty.

REQUIRES [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

![helmet and chestplate recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0a4336fe27007d65022e11c6cddc8412a4f0dfa.png)
![leggings and boots recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0962bde30424fb7a973563ca983b9dbc1bc8c430.png)

If you want this to apply to iron pickaxe check out [this mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sheet-iron-pickaxe)
